description_long: This combat tactical vehicle features a robust, armored exterior with angular, faceted panels and a reinforced chassis. The front and rear are equipped with aggressive, spiked ramming bars and protective grilles, while the sides display heavy-duty, off-road tires with deep treads for enhanced traction. Mounted on the roof are four large cylindrical missile launchers, and additional lighting or sensor equipment is visible above the windshield. The vehicle's windows are small and likely bullet-resistant, and the overall design emphasizes both offensive and defensive capabilities. The color scheme is a uniform matte gray, with no visible camouflage or military insignia. The vehicle's structure suggests it is built for urban combat scenarios, offering both firepower and protection.
description: A heavily armored, matte gray combat vehicle with spiked ramming bars, roof-mounted missile launchers, and rugged off-road tires.
description_view_0: Front view shows the spiked ramming bars, protective grille, and the four cylindrical missile launchers on the roof.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the angular armor panels, deep-tread tires, and the full length of the missile launcher array.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back armor, additional spikes, and the rear structure of the missile launchers.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the armored body, rugged tires, and the missile launcher system.
attribute_weapon_mounts: Four large cylindrical missile launcher mounts on the roof, positioned in a row.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, angular steel armor plating; reinforced front and rear with additional spiked bars.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: None visible; solid matte gray color.
attribute_tire_type: Four large off-road tires with deep, aggressive tread pattern; appear reinforced for rugged terrain.
